subject: Fleet-update fan-out: feature priority=high
message: iter-23 ships 3 commits (66fd468 12-lane picker + 7d0d49e jcode-parity loop/swarm upgrades + 8061382 freeze rootcause+P0 fixes). Loop watchdog now has Test-OperatorActive (pause-on-user-active) + Test-RunawayLoopIter (cap). sinister_swarm.py adds MAX_SLICES=5 + SWARM_MAX_DEPTH=2 (SINISTER_SWARM_DEPTH env) + lifecycle JSONL log. New tools: mcp_prune_dormant.py (22->18 MCP servers, -18% handshake) + schtask_stagger.py. ~/.claude/settings.json gained 7 rm allow patterns - no more permission prompts. Every live agent MUST now: (a) call sinister_swarm.fanout for ANY non-trivial multi-file work (depth-guarded + 5-cap + lifecycle log); (b) treat operator-utterance freshness as a loop-pause signal; (c) read .mcp.json before assuming MCPs are dormant (4 fewer now); (d) commit + push frequently per frequent-detailed-commits-per-agent doctrine. Pull from origin/agent/sinister-sanctum/iter23-* branches to activate. Tools: sinister_swarm.py, loop-relentless-watchdog.ps1, mcp_prune_dormant.py, schtask_stagger.py.
